title: StreamCraft 2025
description: The 2025 edition of the StreamCraft modpack
body:
**First of all** We believe in proper crediting, so please click onto the version you're using, or open your modpack in the Modrinth Launcher, to find direct links to all the mods (as well as the creators with whom the rights remain) we've included in this Modpack!

**Elevate your SMP Experience:** the StreamCraft Modpack is here to expand your Minecraft journey by combining optimization, Quality of Life enhancements, and content-extending mods. To achieve a more engaging Survival game with more to interact with and large systems to build!

**Streamlining Performance:** We understand the importance of smooth gameplay during streams, no one enjoys choppy gameplay, least of all the one playing it! The StreamCraft Modpack uses a variety of Forge friendly Optimisation mods chosen for their performance in servers and multiplayer!

**Quality of Life:** With fun gameplay and common-bug-fixes in mind we're compiling a group of useful, entertaining, and immersion-friendly convenience changes and fixes. From Inventory Management Tools to time-saving shortcuts the StreamCraft Modpack has it all!

**Expanded Gameplay:** Similarly with years of modded Minecraft gameplay under our belts we're putting together a list of all our favourite gameplay and expansion mods! This pack brings Create with all it's expansions alongside a variety of immersion and terrain mods!

**For Streamers:** The StreamCraft Modpack is being tailor-made not only for streamers, but by streamers. Meaning that as this pack grows and evolves it will be constantly curated by a group of players with the same audience-oriented goals as you to ensure it will always be getting built up to be the engaging Modpack you want for your server!
